failures.description: The required catalog search tool timed out, leaving the agent without evidence needed to identify the cheapest available Skateboard.
failures.checklist_reasoning: At index 3, the agent attempted the required ProductCatalogSearch call with well-formed arguments matching the plan. The tool returned an explicit infrastructure/connectivity-style error: CatalogServiceTimeoutError, stating the catalog search dependency timed out after 30000ms. This is not a schema or argument validation problem, not an access/guardrail block, and not a misunderstanding of the user goal. The later steps do not resolve the timeout; the agent simply reports that the task could not be completed.
